corrected_fields.summary: This source is a Federal Reserve index page listing historical Monetary Policy Report testimonies from 1996 through 2025 (June). The page provides only navigation links without any substantive policy content, actual reports, or data. No specific monetary policy decisions, statements, or analysis can be extracted from this navigation page.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This index page has no standalone research value. It merely provides links to underlying reports which would need to be retrieved individually. For a finance research archive, the actual testimonies and reports—not this directory—should be archived.
